hook: Planning well is not about overengineering; it is about removing avoidable friction.
body: Small practical details can quietly shape whether a date feels easy, respectful, and confident.

hook: Many men either improvise too loosely or plan so heavily that the date feels stiff.
body: Have enough structure to lead the moment, but not so much that the moment cannot breathe.

body: Knowing the location, timing, backup move, and travel logic can help you stay relaxed instead of scrambling.
